task.title: Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence
task.summary: Strengthen validation gateway profiles so required audits, graph context, fresh isolation, and content proof are enforced by build kind and change class.

goal.outcome: Gateways block when required audit evidence, graph context, fresh isolation, or content-proof refs are missing for sensitive boundaries.
acceptance: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
non_goals: Do not implement remote push/release automation.
Do not replace deterministic tests with non-deterministic validation.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Dirty working-tree digest is valid for implementation validation only, not task close.
Task-close and publication require clean immutable proof so closed work is recoverable from commit history.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Task-close blocks dirty digest without commit proof.
evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs and tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs assert task-close dirty working_tree_digest produces block.

summary: TASK-080/TASK-084 corrected task-close policy: dirty working-tree digest is allowed only for implementation validation; task-close and publication require clean immutable content proof for recoverability.

source: user clarification: commit per task holds recovery information

evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs covers implementation dirty pass, task-close dirty block, publication dirty block, and clean publication pass.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs covers tool-facing dirty implementation pass and dirty task-close/publication blocks.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/graph.ts treats task-close as immutable-proof profile in isolation summary.
src/adapters/pi/index.ts guidance now states task-close requires immutable proof.
System docs now state commits/content proof are required for task close recovery.
notes: This answers the commit-per-task concern: working-tree digest is only a pre-commit validation bridge, not closure proof. Task close now requires a clean immutable proof such as commit/tree/package/archive/remote ref.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs covers implementation dirty pass, task-close dirty block, publication dirty block, and clean publication pass.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs covers tool-facing dirty implementation pass and dirty task-close/publication blocks.
code_change_evidence: src/application/graph.ts treats task-close as immutable-proof profile in isolation summary.
src/adapters/pi/index.ts guidance now states task-close requires immutable proof.
System docs now state commits/content proof are required for task close recovery.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation validation may use dirty working-tree digest as pre-commit content proof.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `implementation` profile remains `fresh-context-checked-content`; tests assert clean=false plus working_tree_digest passes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Task-close requires recoverable committed content proof.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `task-close` moved to `fresh-context-clean-immutable-content`; tests assert clean=false plus working_tree_digest blocks and clean validated_sha passes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Publication validation remains clean immutable-proof only.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Publication tests still assert dirty digest blocks and clean immutable proof passes.

closure_brief.user_intent: Clarify that commit-per-task is required because commit history is the recovery/update proof for closed work.
implemented_changes: Restricted dirty working-tree digest to implementation validation only.
Moved task-close into clean immutable content-proof policy with publication/push/release.
Updated tests and docs to require commit/tree/package/archive/remote proof for task-close recovery.
remaining_risks: Need per-task commits and task-close validation after commits.

risks: Need actual per-task commits for TASK-078 and TASK-080/TASK-084 before task-close.
Current worktree contains multiple uncommitted historical task changes, so commits must be sliced carefully instead of one mega-commit.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-080 Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-080/TASK-084 corrected task-close policy: dirty working-tree digest is allowed only for implementation validation; task-close and publication require clean immutable content proof for recoverability.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
